app.title: Monster Reincarnation
ui.enemy_veiled: A shape you can't read — you have no eye to appraise it. Find and slot an Appraisal eye to learn more.
ui.farm: Revisit a cleared floor to farm:
ui.no_equipped: No skills equipped — equip some in the Skills tab.
log.discover_appraisal: Discovery: an Appraisal eye — slot it in Body to read your prey.
ui.reset_confirm: Reset everything? Your save will be permanently erased. This cannot be undone.
ui.suggest_prompt: Describe your suggestion (opens as a GitHub issue):
ui.tap_eye: Tap an eye on the head.
ui.eyefusion_locked: Locked — find the 'eyes' lore (Chalk Scrawls book).
ui.eyefusion_need2: Needs at least two slotted (non-hybrid) eyes.
ui.eyefusion_hint: Two slotted eyes → a hybrid in one slot (both passive and active). Same mode on both = blindness penalty.
log.eyefuse: Hybrid eye formed: {a} + {b} — both passive and active from one slot.
log.eyefuse_blind: Hybrid eye: {a} + {b} — but both share one mode, so a blindness penalty applies (dimmed effects and sight).
log.analyzed: {enemy} analyzed — detail shown on the enemy panel (🔍).
log.discover_dread: Discovery: a new eye ability — Dread Gaze!
log.fuse_locked: Fusion isn't available yet — you haven't discovered how to combine skills.
log.fuse_invalid: These can't be fused — pick two different attack skills.
log.fusion_warn: Unstable: {n} incompatible fusions. One more will tear you apart.
log.fusion_death: ☠ Fusion overload! The unstable skills ripped out of you — you barely survive, reborn weaker.
log.discover_fusion: Discovery: the Fusion Lab — combine two attack skills in the Skills tab.
ui.fusion_locked: Locked — discover skill fusion by surviving and hunting.
log.ate_rotten: Ate rotten food — no nourishment, but poison resistance grinds.
log.flee: {enemy} recoils in dread — its attack misses!
log.evolve_ambush: The change left you exposed — you took {dmg} damage!
log.sin_kill: You slew your own kind… sin seeps into your soul.
skill.venom_bite.name: Venom Bite
skill.venom_bite.desc: The first weapon waiting in your jaws. Fangs sink into flesh and pour venom into the blood; while the prey still struggles, the toxin quietly eats it from within. Slow, but unforgiving.
skill.lethal_venom.name: Lethal Venom
skill.sharp_claw.name: Sharp Claw
skill.sharp_claw.desc: A limb honed from chitin to an edge. For those who won't wait on venom: a direct, honest, bloody cut. The oldest instinct — close in and tear.
skill.scythe_limb.name: Scythe Limb
skill.scythe_limb.desc: A scythe-like limb; high piercing damage.
skill.silk_thread.name: Silk Thread
skill.silk_thread.desc: The first silk to leave your body. Thin but stubborn: it slows the prey and breaks its lunge. Your true spider power branches from here — to bind, to cut, to make the field yours.
skill.binding_silk.name: Binding Silk
skill.quick_thought.name: Quick Thought
skill.quick_thought.desc: Your small brain begins to fire unusually fast. You spot danger a beat sooner and find the right combination quicker. The main line that feeds INT — where knowledge turns into power.
skill.accelerated_mind.name: Accelerated Mind
skill.hp_regen.name: HP Regen
skill.hp_regen.desc: At death's edge your body learns something: wounds begin to close on their own. A quiet, constant mending — even mid-fight the flesh slowly stitches itself back.
skill.auto_heal.name: Auto-Heal
skill.appraisal.name: Appraisal
skill.appraisal.desc: The eye that turns looking into a weapon. As it levels it peels back the enemy's type, attack, HP and weakness, layer by layer. The unknowing die twice; the knowing look first, then strike.
skill.insight.name: Insight
skill.insight.desc: Deep appraisal; weak points and resistances.
skill.dread_gaze.name: Dread Gaze
skill.dread_gaze.desc: Eye ability; a slotted dread gaze may make enemies recoil (skip an attack).
skill.larder.name: Larder
skill.larder.desc: Store corpses; more slots as it levels, refrigeration (no decay) at high levels.
ui.acquire_evolution: Evolution forms grant new skills (Stats → Evolve).
ui.acquire_discovery: Discovered while hunting and surviving (e.g. HP Regen near death).
ui.acquire_eyes: Eye abilities are discovered, slotted in Body; two eyes → a hybrid (fusion).
ui.acquire_fusion: Carry ≥2 attack skills to unlock the Fusion Lab → combine skills.
ui.acquire_lore: Sacrifice books open hidden paths: meditation, courting death, taboo…
ui.acquire_ruler: Crossing the Sin/Virtue threshold grants ruler powers.
ui.sacrifice_locked: Deep-read a Sacrifice Journal (enough INT) to sacrifice
ui.delete_confirm: Permanently delete this skill? This cannot be undone.
ui.sacrifice_confirm: Sacrifice this skill? Permanent — you gain stat points + EP in return.
skill.appraisal.acq: Discovered while hunting; slot it on an eye in the Body tab.
skill.dread_gaze.acq: Discovered around level 5+; a passive fear eye.
skill.hp_regen.acq: Discovered fighting near death; the regen lore raises the odds.
skill.undying_husk.acq: Discovered by courting death (Push to the Brink).
skill.necro_toxin.name: Necro Toxin
skill.reaper_edge.name: Reaper Edge
skill.reaper_edge.desc: The scythe evolved; lethal piercing damage.
skill.fist_strike.name: Fist Strike
skill.fist_strike.desc: The most natural weapon of a simple human limb: a clenched fist. No chitin or venom, but delivered with direct, honest, blunt force.
skill.heavy_punch.name: Heavy Punch
skill.heavy_punch.desc: A bone-shattering strike delivered with proper stance and weight behind it.
skill.shattering_strike.name: Shattering Strike
skill.shattering_strike.desc: The ultimate punch combining raw physical power and momentum to rattle and break the target.
skill.cutting_wire.name: Cutting Wire
skill.cutting_wire.desc: Silk that cuts; deals damage as it binds.
skill.parallel_minds.name: Parallel Minds
skill.parallel_minds.desc: Split your mind in two — one more thought. Each mind fires an EXTRA skill per turn ignoring cooldown, and reads the labyrinth for MP/SP while fighting. (+1 skill slot)
skill.regeneration.name: Regeneration
skill.regeneration.desc: Powerful renewal; mends limbs and wounds.
skill.endurance.name: Endurance
skill.toughness.name: Toughness
skill.acid_spit.name: Acid Spit
skill.caustic_spray.name: Caustic Spray
skill.pounce.name: Pounce
skill.pounce.desc: Leap in; bonus damage on the first hit.
skill.ambush_strike.name: Ambush Strike
skill.ambush_strike.desc: A huge opening strike from stealth.
skill.lethal_lunge.name: Lethal Lunge
skill.lethal_lunge.desc: The deadliest leap; heavy piercing damage.
skill.rend.name: Rend
skill.rend.desc: Claw tears a deep, bleeding wound.
skill.maul.name: Maul
skill.maul.desc: A savage physical assault; crushes and tears.
form.undying_horror.name: Undying Horror
form.undying_horror.name.desc: A hidden, hard branch — strong regeneration and an undying streak.
form.arachnid_sovereign.name: Arachnid Sovereign
form.arachnid_sovereign.name.desc: Endgame half-human form — massive stats, can wield items.
res.fire_res.name: Fire Resistance
res.flame_immunity.name: Flame Immunity
res.physical_res.name: Physical Resistance
res.blunt_immunity.name: Blunt Immunity
res.pierce_res.name: Pierce Resistance
res.pierce_immunity.name: Pierce Immunity
res.poison_res.name: Poison Resistance
res.poison_immunity.name: Poison Immunity
zone.lower_stratum.name: Lower Stratum
race.spider.name: Spider
race.human.name: Human
form.hatchling_spider.name: Hatchling Spider
form.lesser_weaver.name: Lesser Weaver
form.venom_weaver.name: Venom Weaver
form.blade_weaver.name: Blade Weaver
form.greater_weaver.name: Greater Weaver
form.shade_stalker.name: Shade Stalker
form.scythe_hunter.name: Scythe Hunter
fusion.effect.poison_web.desc: Venom seeps along every strand — bound prey is poisoned with no escape.
fusion.effect.tainted_strike.desc: Claw meets venom: each blow leaves a lingering, creeping toxin.
fusion.effect.snare_strike.desc: Silk tangles the target a heartbeat before the blow lands.
fusion.effect.rend.desc: Edge and point together tear deep, jagged wounds.
fusion.effect.flame_storm.desc: Wind fans the flame into a roaring, spreading firestorm.
fusion.effect.steam.desc: Water meets fire and erupts into scalding, blinding steam.
fusion.effect.thermal_shock.desc: Fire and frost collide — unstable, recoiling heat that bites the caster too.
fusion.effect.conductive_shock.desc: Lightning races through soaked targets, striking far harder.
fusion.effect.mud.desc: Earth and water churn into clinging, slowing mud.
fusion.effect.reinforce.desc: Two of a kind, fused and concentrated — simply stronger.
fusion.effect.precise_strike.desc: A sharpened mind guides the claw to the exact weak point.
fusion.effect.toxic_blood.desc: Your own venom turns regeneration into a creeping poison reserve.
fusion.effect.mix.desc: Two unlike powers forced together — an unstable hybrid strike.
log.ev_locked: That option is closed to you.
ev.fork.text: The tunnel splits in two. One carries a cool breeze, the other a dead silence.
ev.fork.left_ok: The left path was safe — you gathered some EP.
ev.fork.left_bad: A hidden spike on the left path cut you.
ev.fork.right_ok: An old trail on the right: a lore fragment.
ev.trap.text: A thin wire glints on the floor — a trap mechanism.
ev.trap.disarm_ok: You solved the mechanism and took the core within.
ev.trap.force_hurt: The trap sprang — you took a deep wound.
ev.carcass.text: The carcass of a creature that came before you. Something may be on it.
ev.carcass.loot_food: Still a fresh piece — into the larder.
ev.carcass.loot_map: A map fragment beneath the corpse.
ev.carcass.loot_poison: The carcass was rotten — poison seeped in.
ev.carcass.leave_r: You left the carcass as it was.
ev.altar.text: An altar covered in strange runes. It whispers to whoever pays its price.
ev.altar.offer_stat: The altar accepted — your wisdom grew.
ev.altar.offer_fail: The altar stayed silent; your EP was wasted.
ev.egg.text: In a damp corner, a strange egg pulses like a heartbeat.
ev.egg.crack_food: It was full of a nourishing pulp.
ev.egg.incubate_ok: Your patience paid off — some EP.
ev.egg.leave_r: You did not touch the egg.
ev.passage.text: Air moves through the wall — there may be a hidden passage.
ev.passage.perceive_ok: You sensed the hidden passage — valuable lore fragments.
ev.oldweb.text: An old web abandoned by another spider. Something is still caught in it.
ev.oldweb.loot_food: Fresh prey left in the web — to the larder.
ev.oldweb.loot_bad: The web was still venomous; it got on your hand.
ev.oldweb.absorb_ok: You wove the silk into your own — some EP.
ev.cocoon.text: An old cocoon, tightly wound in web. Something is inside.
ev.cocoon.open_spawn: The cocoon was a trap — a creature emerged!
ev.cocoon.peer_ok: You opened it safely — nourishing prey.
ev.wounded.text: A dying creature looks at you, pleading in its eyes.
ev.wounded.devour_food: You ate your prey; your hunger eased.
ev.wounded.devour_sin: Preying on the weak fed the dark axis.
ev.wounded.spare_virtue: Your mercy fed the light axis.
ev.wounded.ignore_r: You left the creature to its fate.
ev.hatchling.text: A hungry hatchling rubs against your legs.
ev.hatchling.feed_h: You shared your food — your hunger rose.
ev.hatchling.eat_food: You ate the hatchling — a small meal.
ev.hatchling.eat_sin: Eating the defenseless fed the dark axis.
ev.reincarnate.text: A weak creature, reincarnated like you. It watches you.
ev.reincarnate.ally_ok: You shared knowledge — a lore fragment.
ev.reincarnate.eat_ep: You devoured it — drank its strength (EP).
ev.reincarnate.eat_sin: Eating a kindred is a heavy sin.
ev.elementfont.text: A font vibrating with the layer's element. Dangerous, yet tempting.
ev.elementfont.touch_ok: You absorbed the energy — some EP.
ev.elementfont.touch_burn: The font burned you — a lasting mark.
ev.elementfont.draw_ok: Your body endured — your vitality grew.
ev.elementfont.flee_r: You backed away from the font.
ev.journal.text: A bloodstained journal, half-finished, atop a corpse.
ev.journal.read_ok: The pages whispered a clue — lore fragments.
ev.journal.eat_ep: You swallowed the words — a little EP.
ev.journal.keep_r: You took the journal with you.
ev.lorestone.text: A half-burned lore stone with faded runes.
ev.lorestone.solve_ok: You cracked the cipher — a lasting insight.
ev.lorestone.memorize_ok: You committed the runes to memory — a lore fragment.
ev.lorestone.break_ok: You broke the stone — its essence scattered (EP).
ev.watcher.text: An eye opens in the wall, watching you.
ev.watcher.stare_ok: You held its gaze — your mind sharpened.
ev.watcher.stare_dread: The eye pierced you — dread set in.
ev.watcher.blind_hurt: Your strike rebounded — you were wounded.
ev.watcher.blind_ep: You snuffed out the eye — some EP.
ev.rift.text: A rift trembling in reality. A strange pull comes from within.
ev.rift.gaze_ok: The rift showed you knowledge — lore fragments.
ev.rift.gaze_mad: What you saw strained your mind — dread.
ev.rift.reach_skill: You snatched a technique from the rift!
ev.rift.reach_scar: The rift tore your body — a lasting scar.
ev.rift.away_r: You backed away from the rift.
ev.sovereign.text: The remains of a powerful being. They still carry a weight.
ev.sovereign.respect_ok: Your respect fed the light axis.
ev.sovereign.steal_ep: You drained power from the remains (EP).
ev.sovereign.steal_sin: Robbing a grave fed the dark axis.
ev.sovereign.study_ok: You decoded the remains — a lasting knowledge.
ev.skitter.text: A skittering echo in the dark. Something is near.
ev.skitter.follow_ok: You tracked the sound — a map fragment.
ev.skitter.flee_r: You moved away from the sound.
ev.reflection.text: A still pool. You see yourself on its surface.
ev.reflection.look_ok: You found an insight in your reflection — EP.
ev.reflection.look_dread: Your reflection was a stranger — dread set in.
ev.reflection.drink_poison: The water was poisoned — it seeped in.
ev.larder.text: An abandoned larder — a plentiful but suspect heap of food.
ev.larder.eatall_rot: Some of it was rotten — you were poisoned.
ev.larder.pick_ok: You picked the freshest — into the larder.
ev.larder.leave_r: You left the larder as it was.
br.cave.text: I am not what your eye sees, but what is born in my absence. Light drives me away, yet I always return; deepest down, I have been here since the beginning. What is my name?
br.cave.clue: The only thing left at the bottom of the cave when the light dies.
br.flame.text: Fire gives me birth, but when I am born the fire dies. I am the last form of what burned, the grave of heat. What is my name?
br.flame.clue: Every flame returns to this in the end.
br.bone.text: Flesh leaves, bone remains; but I am in neither — I live in word and silence. Forget me, and the dead die a second time. What is my name?
br.bone.clue: What those before you left behind; what lore carries.
ui.br_choose: You bested the boss with wit. What now?
ui.riddle_locked: Too many wrong tries — retry in {min} min.
log.br_solved: You solved the riddle! Skip or fight — your choice.
log.br_wrong: Wrong answer! A guard appeared. ({left} tries left)
log.br_fail_boss: Your last try is gone — an enraged boss faces you!
log.br_skip: You passed the boss with your wit.
log.br_fight: The boss appears at your chosen difficulty!
log.riddle_locked: The room is locked — wait a while.
log.riddle_locked_now: Three wrong! The room locked for a while.
stat.STR.desc: Muscle in your legs, pressure in your fangs — the raw force that crushes prey. The higher it climbs, the deeper every physical blow bites.
stat.VIT.desc: The toughness of your flesh and the length of your breath. It widens the gap between you and death, and lets you fight longer before you tire.
stat.AGI.desc: Reflex faster than instinct — a body that slips into shadow before the blow lands. You evade more often and ready your skills sooner.
stat.INT.desc: The sharpness of your small mind. It shapes your mana and unlocks the deep layers of hidden books — in this world, knowledge is survival itself.
stat.WIS.desc: The quiet voice of intuition — insight that finds the right corner in the dark and stillness in calm. It deepens your exploration rewards and meditation.
stat.LUCK.desc: Fate winking at you. You catch the scent of secret rooms, draw rare loot, and sense an ambush at the last moment.
log.levelup: Level up! Now level {lv} (+{pts} stat points).
log.cap: Level {lv} reached — evolve (Stats tab) to grow further.
log.discover_larder: Discovery: you can now store corpses (Larder)!
enemy.flame_jaw.name: Flame Jaw
enemy.venom_brute.name: Venom Brute
zone.middle_stratum.name: Middle Stratum
zone.deep_warren.name: Deep Warren
layer.1.name: Upper Stratum
layer.2.name: Middle Stratum (Magma)
layer.3.name: Lower Stratum
log.layer_locked: Layer boss down — next layer needs Tier {tier}.
log.dungeon_end: You've reached the deepest known point… for now.
log.explore_room: A calm exploration room — +{ep} EP, you recover a little.
log.explore_lore: While exploring you found a lore fragment.
log.ambient_burn: The zone's {type} environment wears at you — but your resistance is tempering fast.
form.lesser_weaver.name.desc: First growth — bigger stats and an extra skill slot.
form.venom_weaver.name.desc: Venom specialist — boosts INT/STR and venom power.
form.blade_weaver.name.desc: Physical path — STR/AGI, scythe limbs and crits.
form.shade_stalker.name.desc: Assassin — high AGI, stealth and sudden strikes.
form.colossal_weaver.name: Colossal Weaver
form.colossal_weaver.name.desc: Peak of the tank branch — huge VIT, adamant plating and a blood engine.
form.revenant_horror.name: Revenant Horror
form.revenant_horror.name.desc: Undeath deepens — undying vitality and a regenerative core.
form.dread_weaver.name: Dread Weaver
form.dread_weaver.name.desc: Shadow/fear master — phantom presence and plague mist.
form.wraith_sovereign.name: Wraith Sovereign
form.wraith_sovereign.name.desc: Half-spirit sovereign — spatial web and soul gaze. (Layer 3 unlocks here.)
form.elder_sovereign.name: Elder Sovereign
form.elder_sovereign.name.desc: Peak of wisdom — all-sight and precognition.
form.abyssal_sovereign.name: Abyssal Sovereign
form.abyssal_sovereign.name.desc: The threshold of the apex — reaper edge, domination gaze, endless mana.
layer.4.name: Bottom Stratum (Core)
layer.5.name: The First Dark
skill.toxic_cloud.name: Toxic Cloud
skill.toxic_cloud.desc: Leaves a poison cloud; area denial.
skill.plague_mist.name: Plague Mist
skill.plague_mist.desc: A deadly plague mist over a wide area.
skill.spatial_web.name: Spatial Web
skill.spatial_web.desc: Area control; steers enemies, grants evasion.
skill.web_trap.name: Web Trap
skill.web_trap.desc: Lays a trap web on the ground.
skill.snare_field.name: Snare Field
skill.snare_field.desc: A wide snare field; great for idle hunting.
skill.sticky_coat.name: Sticky Coat
skill.adhesive_mastery.name: Adhesive Mastery
skill.all_sight.name: All-Sight
skill.all_sight.desc: The peak eye ability; every layer of the foe.
skill.detect.name: Detect
skill.foresight.name: Foresight
skill.foresight.desc: See the attack coming; more evasion.
skill.precognition.name: Precognition
skill.precognition.desc: A glimpse of the near future; peak evasion.
skill.memory_palace.name: Memory Palace
skill.eidetic_recall.name: Eidetic Recall
skill.mana_sense.name: Mana Sense
skill.mana_control.name: Mana Control
skill.mana_control.desc: Direct magic power; more MP regen.
skill.mana_mastery.name: Mana Mastery
skill.mana_mastery.desc: Mastery of magic; high MP regen.
skill.flame_bolt.name: Flame Bolt
skill.fire_lance.name: Fire Lance
skill.frost_shard.name: Frost Shard
skill.ice_spear.name: Ice Spear
skill.stone_spike.name: Stone Spike
skill.earth_pillar.name: Earth Pillar
skill.gale_cut.name: Gale Cut
skill.wind_blade.name: Wind Blade
skill.spark.name: Spark
skill.lightning_strike.name: Lightning Strike
skill.void_step.name: Void Step
skill.spatial_rift.name: Spatial Rift
skill.piercing_gaze.name: Piercing Gaze
skill.piercing_gaze.desc: Base damage by gaze (active eye, MP).
skill.heavy_gaze.name: Heavy Gaze
skill.numbing_gaze.name: Numbing Gaze
skill.numbing_gaze.desc: Numb/slow; may make the foe miss.
skill.paralytic_gaze.name: Paralytic Gaze
skill.petrify_gaze.name: Petrify Gaze
skill.stone_gaze.name: Stone Gaze
skill.terror_gaze.name: Terror Gaze
skill.terror_gaze.desc: Intense fear aura; foes recoil often.
skill.soul_gaze.name: Soul Gaze
skill.soul_gaze.desc: Direct soul damage; ignores resistance (active eye).
skill.rend_soul_gaze.name: Rend-Soul Gaze
skill.rend_soul_gaze.desc: Heavy true damage; rends the soul.
skill.charm_gaze.name: Charm Gaze
skill.domination_gaze.name: Domination Gaze
skill.undying_vitality.name: Undying Vitality
skill.undying_vitality.desc: The strongest renewal; HP refills fast.
skill.mp_regen.name: MP Regen
skill.mana_flow.name: Mana Flow
skill.endless_mana.name: Endless Mana
skill.undying_will.name: Undying Will
skill.undying_will.desc: High endurance; can survive a lethal hit.
skill.overdraw.name: Overdraw
skill.blood_engine.name: Blood Engine
skill.blood_engine.desc: Draws even more power from missing HP.
skill.carapace.name: Carapace
skill.hardened_shell.name: Hardened Shell
skill.adamant_plating.name: Adamant Plating
skill.stealth.name: Stealth
skill.silent_step.name: Silent Step
skill.phantom_presence.name: Phantom Presence
skill.climb.name: Climb
skill.wall_master.name: Wall Master
skill.forage.name: Forage
skill.scavenger.name: Scavenger
skill.keen_nose.name: Keen Nose
skill.treasure_sense.name: Treasure Sense
skill.lucky_find.name: Lucky Find
skill.fortunes_favor.name: Fortune's Favor
skill.chitin_hide.name: Chitin Hide
skill.chitin_hide.desc: An inborn hardened exoskeleton. Plain but reliable: it sloughs off part of every blow. The first armor of survival, ancestor to every shell that follows.
skill.many_legged_gait.name: Many-Legged Gait
skill.many_legged_gait.desc: Your eight legs move in concert; you flow across the ground. Sliding aside from an incoming strike at the last instant — evasion and speed begin here.
skill.cold_blood.name: Cold Blood
skill.cold_blood.desc: Low energy use; hunger rises slower.
skill.night_born.name: Night Born
skill.apex_predator.name: Apex Predator
skill.apex_predator.desc: Fear aura + damage; weak foes recoil.
skill.carapace_lord.name: Carapace Lord
skill.phase_body.name: Phase Body
skill.regenerative_core.name: Regenerative Core
skill.regenerative_core.desc: Passive renewal organ; raises regen base.
skill.sovereign_form.name: Sovereign Form
skill.undying_husk.name: Undying Husk
skill.undying_husk.desc: Chance to survive a lethal hit.
skill.stillness.name: Stillness
skill.inner_silence.name: Inner Silence
skill.inner_silence.desc: Silence the inner voice; mind resist + renewal.
skill.forbidden_knowledge.name: Forbidden Knowledge
skill.forbidden_knowledge.desc: Key to ruler power; damage + exp.

res.frost_immunity.name: Frost Immunity

res.lightning_immunity.name: Lightning Immunity

ruler.pride.name: Pride
ruler.pride.desc: Permanent boost to all stats + damage.
ruler.wrath.name: Wrath
ruler.greed.name: Greed

ruler.envy.name: Envy

book.book_1.title: Sacrifice Journal I
book.book_1.lore: «…lying on the ground I felt death breathing on my neck. My body began to close itself — independently, as if it had its own mind. I wondered: the closer I went, the faster it learned?»
book.book_1.deep: Deep layer: regeneration accelerates when HP drops below half. Learn to keep your body in the danger zone — wounds teach, comfort numbs.
book.book_2.title: Sacrifice Journal II
book.book_2.lore: «I began seeking pain. Each half-death, each razor-thin survival changed me. Then I understood: it's not surviving that strengthens — it's crossing the threshold and coming back.»
book.book_2.deep: Deep layer: surviving the edge of death leaves a permanent mark. Let it accumulate — your body eventually pushes its limits back. If you have a survival chance, approaching the brink is a training method.
book.book_3.title: Sacrifice Journal III
book.book_3.lore: «I waited motionless for days. Hunger passed, fear passed, thought itself passed. What remained was a strange clarity — and beneath it, something filling without my notice.»
book.book_3.deep: Deep layer: choosing the Meditate action fills an invisible light. You cannot know when it spills over — but it fills with patience. The light path demands depth, not speed.
book.book_4.title: Sacrifice Journal IV
book.book_4.lore: «I combined two powers. I expected an explosion — but a third thing emerged. Neither this nor that; entirely else. And when it collapsed, the scar it left was more permanent than what was born.»
book.book_4.deep: Deep layer: with the Fusion Lab open, any pairing can be attempted. Incompatible combos leave scars — four bad fusions tear you apart. Learn the compatible ones first, then experiment.
book.book_5.title: Sacrifice Journal V
book.book_5.lore: «I touched the forbidden. I could have pulled back — I didn't. Now I see everything I wanted to see. But also what I didn't.»
book.book_5.deep: Deep layer: when Taboo opens, both the Sin/Virtue axis and the Ruler ranking become active. Feed both to grow your authority. A door opened once does not close.
book.book_6.title: Sacrifice Journal VI
book.book_6.lore: «Thousands came here before me. All reached the same gate, all faced the same question. The wall says: be born, die, forget. I say: forget — but roots remain.»
book.book_6.deep: Deep layer: every creature that defeats the Gatekeeper begins the next life with a Tier increase. Levels reset; discoveries, capabilities, and limit expansions persist. Rebirth is not an end, not a reset — it's an ascent.
book.book_7.title: A Hunter's Tally
book.book_7.lore: «Everything alive has a weakness. I pressed fire to ice, lightning to water. Half of victory was knowing what to press where; the other half — was asking before pressing.»
book.book_7.deep: Deep layer: Fire → Ice, Ice → Acid, Poison → Flesh, Lightning → Water — and each reverse holds too. The wrong element dulls damage; the right one collapses it. Learn the enemy's type, then strike.
book.book_8.title: Chalk Scrawls
book.book_8.lore: «I drew eyes on the wall. Then I realized: the dark doesn't see, but place the right eye in the right spot — and seeing becomes a weapon. Was it watching me, or was I being watched, I no longer know.»
book.book_8.deep: Deep layer: different abilities can be slotted into each eye socket. Active mode attacks, passive mode watches and buffers. Want to merge two eyes: Eye Fusion. Even a blinded eye is useful — just place it right.
book.book_9.title: A Scholar's Marginalia
book.book_9.lore: «A beast I didn't know killed me twice. On the third I looked first: what type was it, what was it resistant to, where was it weak. The fourth time I didn't need to look — I knew it.»
book.book_9.deep: Deep layer: as Appraisal levels up it reveals the enemy's type, attack value, HP and weakness. At level 5 the weakness type becomes visible. Knowledge = survival — that's not a slogan, it's a formula.
book.book_10.title: The Fallen Queen's Seal
book.book_10.lore: «Once I was a tiny spider. Now I'm not sure what I am — each evolution step left something behind. Did I gain power, or give up myself?»
book.book_10.deep: Deep layer: evolution branches — there is no going back. See all branches before choosing a form. The strongest form is not always the right one; plan the path, not just the power. Know the branching tree well.
room.room_stillness.name: Silent Room
room.room_stillness.clue: «I open to one who waits doing nothing. Speak my name.» (hint: Sacrifice Journal III)
room.room_brink.name: Brink Room
room.room_brink.clue: «One who seeks me must stand at the edge. Speak my name.» (hint: Sacrifice Journal II)
room.room_hunger.name: Room of the Starving
room.room_hunger.clue: «The power of the never-full. What is it?»
room.room_taboo.name: Forbidden Room
room.room_taboo.clue: «That which is forbidden to touch. Whisper my name.» (hint: Sacrifice Journal V)
diff.easy.name: Easy
diff.normal.name: Normal
diff.hard.name: Hard
diff.hell.name: Hell
fusion.effect.corrode.desc: Acid meets a physical blow; melts armor.
fusion.effect.dissolve_web.desc: Acidic silk; dissolves what it binds.
fusion.effect.necrosis.desc: Acid and poison; a rotting, lethal blend.
fusion.effect.blizzard.desc: Wind hurls the frost; a freezing storm.
fusion.effect.tempest.desc: Wind carries the lightning; a roaring shock.
fusion.effect.magma.desc: Fire and earth; a molten rock flow.
fusion.effect.superconductor.desc: Ice and lightning; unstable, recoiling charge.
fusion.effect.oblivion.desc: Void and soul; a power that unmakes being.
fusion.effect.despair.desc: Fear and soul; a darkness that breaks the will.
fusion.effect.phase_rend.desc: Void and matter; a strike that tears space.
fusion.effect.omniscience.desc: Full access to the system's hidden data.
log.forage_found: You found something. Want to inspect it?
log.forage_nothing: You couldn't find anything to eat here.
ui.no_room: No secret room perceived yet. (High Appraisal + Search)
ui.no_ruler: No ruler power yet. Hunt (sin) or meditate (virtue).
ui.rebirth_ready: The Gatekeeper has fallen — you may be reborn.
ui.rebirth_locked: Defeat the deepest gatekeeper boss (Layer 3, final floor).
ui.permadeath_hint: Permadeath is a true death only in Hell; clear it for a race-specific permanent reward.
log.taboo_authority: You touched the forbidden — ruler authority unlocked.
log.meditation_unlock: From the long silence, a power was born… (Stillness)
log.gatekeeper_down: The Gatekeeper falls! Rebirth is now possible (Stats tab).
log.hell_clear: HELL CLEARED! A permanent reward earned for {race}.
log.rebirth_msg: «You've reached this body's limits. Leave it all behind — be reborn — and let your limits widen.»
log.learn_regen: At death's edge your body learned to mend itself! (HP Regen)
log.court_death: You threw yourself to the brink — 99% gone, but you cling on. One more push is fatal.
log.court_death_fatal: ☠ You pushed past the brink — and over the edge. Death takes you.
log.ate: You feed (+{sat} sated). The urge to eat grows…
log.survive: You clung to life at 1 HP through a lethal blow!
log.permadeath: Permadeath — it is all over. A new beginning.
log.search_room: You sense something… a secret room: {room}.
log.search_done: You've already searched this room — move on, then come back to search again.
log.room_wrong: Wrong answer. The room stays shut.
log.fuse_scar: The backfire left a scar. Total: {scars}.
log.enemy_adapts: The enemy adapted to {type} damage — try a different element!
log.death_resist_hint: Hint: you have no {type} resistance — build it up and you'll survive longer.

skill.predator_instinct.name: Predator Instinct
skill.predator_instinct.desc: The slime's evolutionary genius: learns from every meal, earns more from every kill. Loot multiplier increased.
skill.undead_vigor.name: Undead Vigor
skill.undead_vigor.desc: The skeleton's perpetual rebound energy — the strange power flowing between bones constantly mends HP and stamina.
skill.draconic_blood.name: Draconic Blood
skill.draconic_blood.desc: The wyrmling's lineage learns from every exchange. Experience gained is noticeably increased.
skill.stone_nature.name: Stone Nature
skill.stone_nature.desc: A golem's stone body barely needs sustenance — hunger rises much more slowly.
ui.race_select_info: Select your race before combat (can change until your first kill).

log.devour_skill: Devoured {enemy} and absorbed its essence: learned {skill}!
skill.sword_slash.name: Sword Slash
skill.sword_slash.desc: A basic combat maneuver. Swing your blade in a wide arc to slash the opponent, dealing physical damage.
skill.blade_dance.name: Blade Dance
skill.blade_dance.desc: Unleash a fluid sequence of quick sword strikes, overwhelming the target with steel.
skill.righteous_strike.name: Righteous Strike
skill.righteous_strike.desc: Deliver a heavy, devastating overhead blow infused with sheer physical momentum.
skill.shield_guard.name: Shield Guard
skill.shield_guard.desc: Raise your shield to deflect attacks, providing a steady increase to physical armor.
skill.shield_wall.name: Shield Wall
skill.shield_wall.desc: An advanced defensive posture, turning your shield into a bulwark against all incoming strikes.
skill.bastion.name: Bastion Defense
skill.bastion.desc: The pinnacle of shield defense, establishing an unbreakable armor fortress.
skill.holy_strike.name: Holy Strike
skill.holy_strike.desc: Strike with a weapon cloaked in divine light, dealing magical damage.
skill.divine_smite.name: Divine Smite
skill.divine_smite.desc: Call down a column of sacred power to smite the enemy with great magical force.
skill.divine_recovery.name: Divine Grace
skill.divine_recovery.desc: Divine power flows through you, accelerating your health regeneration.
skill.weapon_mastery.name: Weapon Mastery
skill.weapon_mastery.desc: Hone your combat technique, permanently increasing all physical damage dealt.
skill.blade_mastery.name: Blade Mastery
skill.blade_mastery.desc: Perfect control of your weapons, maximizing physical damage multipliers.
skill.parry.name: Parry
skill.parry.desc: Skillfully deflect enemy attacks, granting a passive bonus to dodge chance.
skill.battle_cry.name: Battle Cry
skill.battle_cry.desc: A booming roar that strikes fear into the enemy's heart, dealing fear damage.
skill.iron_will.name: Iron Will
skill.iron_will.desc: Unbending mental focus that increases stamina recovery and gives a chance to survive fatal blows.
skill.mana_shield.name: Mana Shield
skill.mana_shield.desc: Envelop yourself in protective mana, allowing you to absorb damage using your MP.
skill.gelatinous_body.name: Gelatinous Body
skill.gelatinous_body.desc: Your fluid slime body naturally dampens impacts, granting flat physical armor protection.
skill.elastic_shield.name: Elastic Shield
skill.elastic_shield.desc: Your outer membrane becomes highly elastic, deflecting heavy blows and increasing armor.
skill.primordial_ooze_shield.name: Primordial Shield
skill.primordial_ooze_shield.desc: The ultimate state of gelatinous resilience, turning raw force into harmless bounce.
skill.acid_deluge.name: Acid Deluge
skill.acid_deluge.desc: Erupt with a massive flood of highly concentrated acid, melting through enemy HP.
skill.dissolving_touch.name: Dissolving Touch
skill.dissolving_touch.desc: Your touch carries corrosive residue, permanently multiplying all acid damage dealt.
skill.bone_armor.name: Bone Armor
skill.bone_armor.desc: Weave loose bones into a protective shell, adding flat physical armor.
skill.hardened_ribs.name: Hardened Ribs
skill.hardened_ribs.desc: Reinforce your ribcage and joints, heavily increasing armor.
skill.bone_fortress.name: Bone Fortress
skill.bone_fortress.desc: Encase yourself in a thick, steel-hard cage of calcified bones for ultimate protection.
skill.shadow_bolt.name: Shadow Bolt
skill.shadow_bolt.desc: Launch a sphere of condensed dark energy, dealing magical damage to the prey.
skill.decay_curse.name: Decay Curse
skill.decay_curse.desc: Inflict a rotting hex that slowly eats away at the enemy's life force, dealing high magical damage.
skill.bone_arrow.name: Bone Arrow
skill.bone_arrow.desc: Fire a razor-sharp bone splinter, dealing direct pierce damage.
skill.arrow_barrage.name: Arrow Barrage
skill.arrow_barrage.desc: Unleash a volley of bone arrows, lacerating the target with pierce damage.
skill.unholy_heart.name: Unholy Heart
skill.unholy_heart.desc: A necrotic fire burns in your chest, generating constant health regeneration.
skill.dragon_claw.name: Dragon Claw
skill.dragon_claw.desc: Slash the target with thick, clawed draconic limbs, dealing physical damage.
skill.dragon_slash.name: Dragon Slash
skill.dragon_slash.desc: Rend the enemy with a powerful diagonal strike of your claws, dealing heavy physical damage.
skill.fire_breath.name: Fire Breath
skill.fire_breath.desc: Exhale a burst of draconic flames, dealing magic fire damage.
skill.scorching_breath.name: Scorching Breath
skill.scorching_breath.desc: Unleash an unrelenting stream of white-hot dragon fire, dealing massive fire damage.
skill.dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale
skill.dragon_scale.desc: Grow hardened dragon scales that easily absorb physical blows.
skill.hardened_scales.name: Hardened Scales
skill.hardened_scales.desc: Draconic scales calcify into plates of natural armor, drastically reducing physical damage.
skill.dragon_heart.name: Dragon Heart
skill.dragon_heart.desc: The burning lineage of a dragon beats in your chest, granting massive health regeneration.
skill.void_barrier.name: Void Barrier
skill.void_barrier.desc: A thin layer of void energy wraps around you, throwing off enemy aim and increasing dodge chance.
skill.stone_skin.name: Stone Skin
skill.stone_skin.desc: Your rocky exterior absorbs impacts, providing flat physical armor.
skill.iron_plating.name: Iron Plating
skill.iron_plating.desc: Infuse your stone skin with iron veins, greatly increasing armor.
skill.obsidian_carapace.name: Obsidian Carapace
skill.obsidian_carapace.desc: Hone your body into sharp, indestructible obsidian plates for maximum armor.
skill.steam_engine.name: Steam Engine
skill.steam_engine.desc: A mechanical steam engine operates inside you, increasing missing-HP damage multiplier.
skill.heavy_slam.name: Heavy Slam
skill.heavy_slam.desc: Slam your heavy fists onto the target, dealing high physical damage.
skill.magma_fist.name: Magma Fist
skill.magma_fist.desc: Coat your fist in molten rock, dealing massive fire magic damage.
skill.unyielding_core.name: Unyielding Core
skill.unyielding_core.desc: A solid, uncracked core that gives you a chance to survive fatal blows with 1 HP.
skill.crystal_heart.name: Crystal Heart
skill.crystal_heart.desc: A vibrant magic crystal constantly generates life energy, granting massive health regeneration.

skill.predator.name: Predator
skill.predator.desc: Devours the hunted — boosts loot and experience gain.
skill.gluttony.name: Gluttony
skill.gluttony.desc: Evolved Predator: grows stronger and regenerates as it feeds.
skill.beelzebuth.name: Beelzebuth
skill.beelzebuth.desc: Lord of Gluttony — bottomless stomach, a chance to survive a lethal blow.
skill.great_sage.name: Great Sage
skill.great_sage.desc: Thought acceleration and analysis — raises experience and damage.
skill.raphael.name: Raphael
skill.raphael.desc: Lord of Wisdom — god-tier computation: huge XP/damage bonus and survival.

sig.title: Race Power
sig.spider_hint: ≈{dmg} opening damage to the next enemy
sig.spider_empty: Weaves web while resting — bursts as a trap in combat
sig.wyrmling_hint: When full, the next attack erupts for +{burst} fire
sig.skeleton_hint: +{armor} armor (grows per kill, slowly erodes in combat)
sig.slime_empty: Kill an elemental enemy → absorb resistance to that element
sig.golem_hint: Absorbs {absorb} damage with stone skin when hit
res.petrify_res.name: Petrify Resistance
res.stun_res.name: Stun Resistance
res.petrify_immunity.name: Petrify Immunity
res.stun_immunity.name: Stun Immunity
log.labyrinth_awakening: 🕷 500 souls in the labyrinth… the spider goddess within awakens. (Stats → Evolution)
skill.pain_resistance.name: Pain Resistance
skill.pain_resistance.desc: You grow used to pain — below half HP you ignore part of incoming damage.
skill.pain_nullification.name: Pain Nullification
skill.pain_nullification.desc: You don't feel pain at all. At low HP most incoming damage is ignored; a chance to survive a lethal blow.
skill.spatial_maneuver.name: Spatial Maneuver
skill.spatial_maneuver.desc: Cast a thread into empty space and glide mid-air — higher dodge chance.
skill.flash_step.name: Flash Step
skill.flash_step.desc: Reposition in an instant; a master of evading enemy strikes.
skill.sage_mind.name: Sage Mind
skill.sage_mind.desc: A sharp, parallel-thinking intellect — more XP gain and damage.
skill.wisdom.name: Wisdom
skill.wisdom.desc: The superior mind that sees the limits of the System. Huge XP/damage gain and survival instinct.
form.zoa_ele.name: Zoa Ele
form.ede_saine.name: Ede Saine
form.arachne.name: Arachne
form.zana_horowa.name: Zana Horowa
skill.parallel_will.name: Parallel Will
skill.parallel_will.desc: Two parallel minds: two extra simultaneous actions (attack/cast), more passive regen and finds. (+2 skill slots)
skill.parallel_existence.name: Parallel Existence
skill.parallel_existence.desc: Three parallel minds at once — three extra actions, strong passive regen, constant discovery. Think like Kumoko. (+3 skill slots)
log.parallel_search: 🧠 A parallel mind read the labyrinth — found a fragment
skill.meteor.name: Meteor
skill.meteor.desc: Calls down a flaming sphere; devastating fire damage.
skill.glacier_spike.name: Glacier Spike
skill.glacier_spike.desc: Impales with a massive ice shard; heavy frost damage.
skill.tectonic_crush.name: Tectonic Crush
skill.tectonic_crush.desc: Splits the earth and crushes with stone; great physical damage.
skill.tempest_blade.name: Tempest Blade
skill.tempest_blade.desc: A cyclone of cutting wind; high pierce damage.
skill.thunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
skill.thunderstorm.desc: Rains chained lightning; very high lightning damage.
skill.dimension_collapse.name: Dimension Collapse
skill.dimension_collapse.desc: Folds space onto the foe; great arcane damage.
skill.holy_judgment.name: Holy Judgment
skill.holy_judgment.desc: A pillar of celestial light; high holy damage.
skill.infernal_breath.name: Infernal Breath
skill.plague_fang.name: Plague Fang
skill.plague_fang.desc: Injects a lethal plague; high poison damage.
skill.death_scythe.name: Death Scythe
skill.death_scythe.desc: A reaping scythe blow; high pierce damage.
skill.cataclysm_strike.name: Cataclysm Strike
skill.cataclysm_strike.desc: A ground-shaking crush; great physical damage.
skill.assassinate.name: Assassinate
skill.assassinate.desc: A lethal piercing finish; very high pierce damage.
skill.rampage.name: Rampage
skill.rampage.desc: An unstoppable savage assault; high physical damage.
skill.arrow_storm.name: Arrow Storm
skill.arrow_storm.desc: Fills the sky with arrows; high pierce damage.
skill.wyrm_devastation.name: Wyrm Devastation
skill.wyrm_devastation.desc: Rends with draconic claws; great physical damage.
skill.medusa_gaze.name: Medusa Gaze
skill.medusa_gaze.desc: Turns foes to stone with a glance; frequently negates their attacks.
skill.nightmare_gaze.name: Nightmare Gaze
skill.soul_devour_gaze.name: Soul Devour Gaze
skill.soul_devour_gaze.desc: Devours the enemy soul; mostly negates their attacks.
skill.tyrant_gaze.name: Tyrant Gaze
skill.tyrant_gaze.desc: Imposes your will; the foe often cannot attack.
skill.fortress_body.name: Fortress Body
skill.fortress_body.desc: Your body becomes an impregnable fortress; high armor.
skill.titan_carapace.name: Titan Carapace
skill.ossuary_bastion.name: Ossuary Bastion
skill.ossuary_bastion.desc: A fortress woven from bone; high armor.
skill.primordial_heart.name: Primordial Heart
skill.primordial_heart.desc: The primal dragon heart; powerful sustained regeneration.
skill.null_field.name: Null Field
skill.null_field.desc: Wraps you in void; armor and dodge.
skill.eternal_regen.name: Eternal Regen
skill.aegis_eternal.name: Aegis Eternal
skill.aegis_eternal.desc: An unbreakable holy shield; high armor.
skill.deathless.name: Deathless
skill.deathless.desc: You refuse death; high chance to survive a lethal blow.
ui.human_path_intro: You have reached LV10. You must choose a specialization path.
human.path.tank.desc: +3 VIT · Iron Will and Battle Cry skills
human.path.mage.desc: +3 INT · Mana Control and Mana Shield skills
human.path.assassin.desc: +3 AGI · Stealth and Ambush Strike skills
human.path.healer.desc: +3 WIS · Divine Grace and Regeneration skills
skill.true_sight.name: True Sight
skill.true_sight.desc: Fusion of Appraisal and Sharp Gaze; reveals all enemy weaknesses.
skill.plague_weaver.name: Plague Weaver
skill.plague_weaver.desc: Fusion of Venom and Silk Thread; hits foe with both web and poison.
ui.soul_info: Spend Souls earned at rebirth on permanent upgrades. The deeper you reach, the more Souls.
soul.predator_soul.name: Predator Soul
soul.ancient_armor.name: Ancient Armor
soul.greed_soul.name: Greed
soul.sleepless.name: Sleepless Mind
soul.wisdom_soul.name: Wisdom
soul.wisdom_soul.desc: Each level: -5% ambush chance during evolution.
soul.soul_luck.name: Soul Luck
soul.soul_luck.desc: Each level: +6% Souls earned at rebirth.
soul.extra_slot.name: Extra Slot
